scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web,worker "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web" "npm run dev:worker"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/config && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/domain && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/logger && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/queue && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/api && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/web && npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/worker
scripts.ci:quality: bash -n scripts/*.sh && npm run lint && npm run format && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && VITE_FIXTURES=1 npm run build --workspace @sitelayer/web && npm run e2e
